entity_proposals.description: A class representing various types of derivatives and their approximations used in numerical methods.
entity_proposals.justification: This new class is necessary to encompass the specific concepts of finite difference approximation, first derivative, directional derivative, and k-th derivative, which are all related to the broader idea of derivatives in numerical analysis, while existing classes do not adequately capture this specific conceptual family.

members.name: finite difference approximation
sources: A First Course in Numerical Methods – Ascher & Greif_chunk_94.4
